options.name: Archery
options.description: +2 bonus to attack rolls you make with ranged weapons.

options.name: Defense
options.description: +1 bonus to AC while you are wearing armor.

options.name: Dueling
options.description: +2 damage when wielding a single one-handed weapon with no other weapon.

options.name: Great Weapon Fighting
options.description: Reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice for two-handed or versatile weapon attacks.

options.name: Protection
options.description: Use your reaction and shield to impose disadvantage on an attack against an adjacent ally.

options.name: Two-Weapon Fighting
options.description: Add your ability modifier to the damage of the bonus-action off-hand attack.
